data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for read-state tracking of in-app style notifications.
data.assessment: The requirement for read-state tracking for in-app style notifications is not supported by any concrete evidence in the provided data. While the linked use case mentions the need for this feature, there are no delivery rows or related data that confirm its implementation. This lack of evidence leads to the conclusion that the validation is blocked and cannot be assessed at this time.
gaps: No delivery rows or evidence of read-state tracking for in-app notifications provided.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the read-state tracking requirement.
